title: SUMMER CAMPS - 211info
text: HEARTSONG LIVING ARTS SUMMER CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a summer camp where children learn about nature, storytelling, crafts, and outdoor skills while building community and respect for the natural world. The Garden At Atlan 37 Nestor Peak Road White Salmon, WA 98672 Eligibility: Ages 3-15 Hours: Monday, June 29, 2026-Friday, August 21, 2026 Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: See website FEES: Varies DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Hood River County Services: Camps General Recreational Activities/Sports Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
